name: Seismic Bond

topRankStats: While a channeled Ability is active, Companion melee attacks create a 4m shockwave for 30% of their melee attack damage. Damage dealt by your Companion increases your Ability Efficiency by 3% for 12 seconds. Max 10 stacks.
levelStats: While a channeled Ability is active, Companion melee attacks create a 4m shockwave for 5% of their melee attack damage. Damage dealt by your Companion increases your Ability Efficiency by 0.5% for 2 seconds. Max 10 stacks.
